languages.text: "Постой, Альва-9. Твой соратник, Декабалус, тоже говорил мне о ереси, которая охватила платформу. Но он называл ее источником тебя..."

traits.locale_text: "Постой, Альва-9. Твой соратник, Декабалус, тоже говорил мне о ереси, которая охватила платформу. Но он называл ее источником тебя..."

languages.text: "I must stop you there, Alva-9. Your comrade, Decabalus, also told me of the heresy that has engulfed this platform. But he named you as the source of it..."
languages.original_text: "Постой, Альва-9. Твой соратник, Декабалус, тоже говорил мне о ереси, которая охватила платформу. Но он называл ее источником тебя..."

traits.locale_text: "I must stop you there, Alva-9. Your comrade, Decabalus, also told me of the heresy that has engulfed this platform. But he named you as the source of it..."
"I must stop you there, Alva-9. Your comrade, Decabalus, also told me of the heresy that has engulfed this platform. But he named you as the source of it..."
"I must stop you there, Alva-9. Your comrade, Decabalus, also told me of the heresy that has engulfed this platform. But he named you as the source of it..."

languages.text: 「アルバ9、ここで止めておく必要がある。君の仲間であるデカバロスも、このプラットフォームを包み込んだ異端について語った。しかし、異端の源は君だと彼は言った…」
languages.original_text: "I must stop you there, Alva-9. Your comrade, Decabalus, also told me of the heresy that has engulfed this platform. But he named you as the source of it..."

traits.locale_text: 「アルバ9、ここで止めておく必要がある。君の仲間であるデカバロスも、このプラットフォームを包み込んだ異端について語った。しかし、異端の源は君だと彼は言った…」

languages.text: «Debo interrumpirle, Alva-9. Su camarada Decabalus también habló de la herejía que se adueña de esta plataforma, pero la nombró a usted como su fuente...».
languages.original_text: "I must stop you there, Alva-9. Your comrade, Decabalus, also told me of the heresy that has engulfed this platform. But he named you as the source of it..."

traits.locale_text: «Debo interrumpirle, Alva-9. Su camarada Decabalus también habló de la herejía que se adueña de esta plataforma, pero la nombró a usted como su fuente...».

languages.text: “我得打断一下，阿尔瓦-9。你的同僚，德卡巴洛斯也告诉我平台遭到了异端侵蚀。但他指认说，你才是罪魁祸首……”
languages.original_text: "I must stop you there, Alva-9. Your comrade, Decabalus, also told me of the heresy that has engulfed this platform. But he named you as the source of it..."

traits.locale_text: “我得打断一下，阿尔瓦-9。你的同僚，德卡巴洛斯也告诉我平台遭到了异端侵蚀。但他指认说，你才是罪魁祸首……”

languages.text: "Ich fürchte, ich muss Euch unterbrechen, Alva-9. Euer Kamerad Decabalus hat mir auch von der auf dieser Plattform kursierenden Ketzerei erzählt. Er sagte allerdings, sie würde von Euch ausgehen ..."
languages.original_text: "I must stop you there, Alva-9. Your comrade, Decabalus, also told me of the heresy that has engulfed this platform. But he named you as the source of it..."

traits.locale_text: "Ich fürchte, ich muss Euch unterbrechen, Alva-9. Euer Kamerad Decabalus hat mir auch von der auf dieser Plattform kursierenden Ketzerei erzählt. Er sagte allerdings, sie würde von Euch ausgehen ..."

languages.text: "Orada seni durdurmalıyım Alva-9. Yoldaşın Decabalus da bana bu platformu saran kâfirlikten bahsetti. Fakat bunun kaynağı olarak seni gösterdi..."
languages.original_text: "I must stop you there, Alva-9. Your comrade, Decabalus, also told me of the heresy that has engulfed this platform. But he named you as the source of it..."

traits.locale_text: "Orada seni durdurmalıyım Alva-9. Yoldaşın Decabalus da bana bu platformu saran kâfirlikten bahsetti. Fakat bunun kaynağı olarak seni gösterdi..."

languages.text: « Je vous arrête là, Alva-9. Votre camarade Décabalus m'a également prévenu que cette plateforme sombrait dans l'hérésie. En revanche, selon lui, la source du problème, c'est vous… »
languages.original_text: "I must stop you there, Alva-9. Your comrade, Decabalus, also told me of the heresy that has engulfed this platform. But he named you as the source of it..."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous arrête là, Alva-9. Votre camarade Décabalus m'a également prévenu que cette plateforme sombrait dans l'hérésie. En revanche, selon lui, la source du problème, c'est vous… »
